COURT FINDS CALIFORNIA HAS JURISDICTION OVER THIS MATTER. NEITHER PARTY TO REMOVE THE MINOR FROM SAN FRANCISCO OR ALAMEDA COUNTIES. COURT ORDERS JOINT LEGAL CUSTODY O
F MINOR WITH PRIMARY PHYSICAL CUSTODY TO MOTHER AS LONG AS SHE REMAINS IN ALAMEDA COUNTY. BOTH PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO GO TO MEDIATION 4/8/99. EACH
S FROM 4:30 PM TO 7:30 PM WITH PICK UP/DROP AT RALLY. MATTER TO BE SET FOR REVIEW IN JUNE. PARTIES TO BRING EVIDENCE OF PARTICIPATION IN PARENTING
CLASS AND PROPOSAL RE CHILD VISITATION WITH OTHER PARENT CROSS-COUNTRY. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO 6/7/99 AT 2:00 PM FOR REVIEW. (404-SBK) MARGARET DEL COTO #8493
